projects.title: Document Translator
projects.bodyText: Developed a document translation tool using the Azure AI Translator API to translate files into multiple languages while preserving original formatting. Identified limitations of the built in translation tool for JSON documents and implemented custom logic to support structured JSON translation.

projects.title: E2Metrics
projects.bodyText: Designed a web application to analyze the performance of GitHub Repositories. Analyzed Git repositories to track progress,calculate key metrics and visualize data using a dynamic dashboard.

projects.title: Automatic Boxing Training Machine
projects.bodyText: Designed a system that allows individuals to engage in boxing practice independently, without the assistance of a trainer or a sparring partner. The Atmega32 microcontroller, along with other sensors, was used as hardware components in the system.

projects.title: Multimodal Data Integration for Stock Investment Decision Making
projects.bodyText: Developed a recommendation system that integrates social media sentiment, news, historical stock data, and financial indicators to guide investors in making informed decisions on S&P SL20 stocks in the Colombo Stock Exchange (CSE).Built predictive models to forecast stock prices, returns, and risk, supporting data-driven investment decisions.

projects.title: Purchase Order Management System
projects.bodyText: Developed a full-stack Purchase Order Management system with complete CRUD functionality.Implemented RESTful APIs using Entity Framework Core (Code First), including filtering, sorting, and pagination.

projects.title: Serenity-BDD Test Suite for UI & API
projects.bodyText: Built automated UI and API test suites using Serenity BDD with Selenium, Rest Assured, and Cucumber, integrated with GitHub Actions for CI/CD and comprehensive test reporting., and severe weather alerts.
